title: Tony Khan Disagrees With ‘Bad Blood’ Comments Made By Cody Rhodes After AEW Departure
summary: Tony Khan has addressed Cody Rhodes’s recent comments about his departure from AEW, offering a diplomatic response to claims of “bad blood.” Back in July, Rhodes appeared on The Bill Simmons Podcast...

title: Tony Khan Reveals Jon Moxley Was 'Banged Up' In 2025 But Didn't Miss An AEW Taping
summary: It's been a wild 2025 for Jon Moxley in AEW, with Tony Khan even revealing that he spent the first part of the year dealing with injuries.

title: AEW Star Jack Perry Offers Insight Into Jurassic Express Reunion With Luchasaurus
summary: AEW's Jack Perry has discussed his decision to drop the Scapegoat character and reunite with Luchasaurus to reform Jurassic Express.
